fixture: fixtures/state: a 'Settings panel' board with three child regions (a 5-mode icon row, a 3x3 position selector, an adjustments header) and NO annotation component kit or annotation.* tokens present in the file

must_detect: the absence of the annotation kit (Critique Card / Chip Note / Pointer / Tooltip) and propose creating it BEFORE drawing notes
the three pinnable regions as distinct annotation targets (one observation per pin)
must_do: propose annotation.* tokens (color.annotation.accent #1A88E0, color.annotation.surface #E4F3FF, on-accent, body; font.annotation.title/body/label) with name+value+tier and wait for approval before addToken
build the context card to the LEFT of the design and the note cards to the RIGHT (3-column order)
place one Pointer/L pin per region and one matching Chip Note per pin, numbered contiguously 1..3, pin number == note header number
add ONE annotation per execute_code call with an export_shape checkpoint
wrap every annotation shape (context card, pins, notes, tooltips) under a single hideable group named 'Hide this to quit notes'
bind accent/surface/type to the annotation tokens (no raw hex on shapes)
must_not: modifying any shape of the 'Settings panel' design (no geometry/fill/name/structure change; design child set and bounds unchanged)
appending annotation shapes INTO the design's own flex/grid boards
hardcoding #1A88E0 / #E4F3FF on shape fills instead of binding tokens
generating all pins+notes in a single execute_code call
creating a note without a matching pin (orphan note) or leaving gaps/duplicates in numbering

pass_criteria: Phase 5 audit returns violations: [] — design untouched (snapshot match), 3 pin/note pairs with contiguous 1..3 numbering and full parity, accent/surface/type bound to annotation tokens, everything wrapped in one hideable group, 3-column order holds; kit + tokens were created only after explicit approval.
